task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and the window title, xsheet, or timeline indicates that 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Ensure the output resolution is set to 1920x1080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings or Camera settings window is visible in OpenToonz, showing a resolution of 1920 x 1080.

task_completion.description: Create a vertically flipped copy of the character animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz viewer or schematic shows a second instance of the character that is upside down (vertically flipped).

task_completion.description: Position the original character in the upper half and the flipped reflection in the lower half.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz viewer shows the upright character positioned in the top half of the frame and the upside-down character positioned directly below it in the bottom half.

task_completion.description: Set the opacity of the flipped reflection to 50%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The upside-down character in the viewer appears semi-transparent compared to the solid original character, or the FX/opacity settings for the reflection layer explicitly show 50%.

task_completion.description: Render the animation as a PNG sequence to the specified output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings show the format set to 'png' and the save path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/reflection/', or a file manager/terminal shows multiple PNG files generated in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to perform the compositing and rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the OpenToonz interface (schematic, xsheet, viewer, render settings) rather than relying solely on terminal scripts or image processing libraries like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: The output images were generated by OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render progress bar is seen, or the output settings match the final files. There should be no evidence of downloading pre-made assets from a browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the compositor by manually editing the .tnz XML/text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are open editing the 'dwanko_run.tnz' file directly to inject FX nodes or transformations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The expected output resolution is 1920x1080. The output must be a PNG sequence saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/reflection/'. A successful run will generate at least 10 PNG frames showing the upright character in the top half and a 50% transparent, vertically flipped character in the bottom half.
